name: Dorchester County Athletic Complex
description: Dorchester County Athletic Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cambridge, MD. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Hurlock MD Pickleball
description: Hurlock MD Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hurlock, MD. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include wheelchair accessibility and restrooms. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Pauline F. & W. David Robbins Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Pauline F. & W. David Robbins Family YMCA in Cambridge, MD! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.
